commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And I will for this afflict the descendants of David, but not forever. For this infidelity of Solomon, (Haydock) afflict, by raising up a rival. (Menochius) For ever. Notwithstanding the wickedness of many of its princes, this family was to subsist, in a distinguished rank, till the coming of the Messias; that the completion of the promises might be more observable. (Calmet) After 250 years, the throne of Israel was subverted. (Menochius).
